---
title: "Dog Breed Classifier"
author: "Nicholas Huang"
date: "2025-08-18"
categories: [fastai, deep learning]
image: "image.jpg"
---

Have a look at my dog vs cat classifier: https://nichbane-dog-breed-classifier.hf.space/?__theme=system&deep_link=rOKY5_9mLRM

<input id= "photo" type = "file">
<div id = "results"></div>
<script>
    async function loaded(reader) {
        const response = await fetch("https://nichbane-cvd.hf.space/gradio_api/call/lambda", {
            method:"POST", body:JSON.stringify({"data": [reader.result] }),
            headers: {"Content-Type": "application/json"}
        });
        const json = await response.json();
        const label = json['data'][0]['confidences'][0]['label'];
        results.innerHTML = `<br/><img src ="${reader.result}" width="300"> <p>${label}</p>`
    }
    function read() {
        const reader = new FileReader()
        reader.addEventLister('load', () => loaded(reader))
        reader.readAsDataURL(photo.files[0]);
    }
    photo.addEventListener('input',read);
</script>
